raw_text:
Hi everyone,
This is Sankha this side.
Hope everyone is doing fine..!

Well I had to tell you something, with a very heavy heart I'm writing this.
I'm shifting back to kolkata,my hometown.
Not sure if I'll be back in BLR or not if I come back definitely my first act will be joining BBB again and have a huge meet-up with y'all.

Had a great time with you guys over these months from march till today. Had lots of fun and had good and bad times together.

But as I'm going back to kolkata, I'm leaving the community!

Everyone is having my contact, if you want I'm one ping drop away..!

Was always there for BBB and will be..!

Thank you everyone for loving me so much !
I need car parking near b narayanapura or mahadepura area for paid parking monthly payment system,

raw_text:
Honoring Our Roots: A Shared Remembrance of Kobiguru 🌾

Dear Bongo Buddies, @all

Family,22shey Shrabon is a day to pause and remember Kobiguru Rabindranath Thakur. While we can party any weekend, stepping back for just one weekend allows us to do something powerful: reconnect with our roots. We want to recreate the exact nostalgic, cultural atmosphere we all grew up with in our schools and colleges back in West Bengal.We know some might say, "But Kobiguru loved non-veg!" That is true, and we promise to celebrate his culinary favorites with a grand feast on 25shey Boisakh (his birth anniversary).However, 22shey Shrabon calls for quiet reflection. By gathering over a traditional Niramish (vegetarian) menu, we honor his legacy with dignity and unity. Let’s stand together to keep our heritage alive, miles away from home.Thank you all for your understanding and support. See you there. 🤍

We want to recreate the exact nostalgic, cultural atmosphere we all grew up with in our schools and colleges back in West Bengal.We know some might say, "But Kobiguru loved non-veg!" That is true, and we promise to celebrate his culinary favorites with a grand feast on 25shey Boisakh (his birth anniversary).However, 22shey Shrabon calls for quiet reflection. By gathering over a traditional Niramish (vegetarian) menu, we honor his legacy with dignity and unity. Let’s stand together to keep our heritage alive, miles away from home.Thank you all for your understanding and support. See you there. 🤍

raw_text:
Hello everyone,

I hope you're doing well. My name is Somnath. I completed my Bachelor's in Social Work from Visva-Bharati University and my Master's in Development Studies from Azim Premji University, Bangalore.

I am currently conducting a research study on how family acceptance and rejection influence the mental health of queer individuals.

I am looking to interview queer individuals (18 years and above) who are willing to share their experiences. If you know someone who may be interested in participating, or if you could connect me with relevant individuals or organisations, it would be a great help.

Participation is completely voluntary, and all interviews will be kept strictly confidential and anonymous. No personal information or identifying details will be disclosed, and participants may choose not to answer any question or withdraw from the interview at any time.

If you would like to know more about the study or help connect me with potential participants, please feel free to reach out to me directly.

Thank you so much for your time and support.
Hello everyone, I’m Shinjini, I’m a masters student in Manipal University, been a year living here, looking forward to make new friends here and be a part of this community!
